anchor.snippet: the complex conjugate of a complex number is the number with an equal real part and an imaginary part equal in magnitude but opposite in sign

annotations.label: Product of a number and its conjugate is real

anchor.snippet: The product of a complex number and its conjugate is a real number
If a root of a univariate polynomial with real coefficients is complex, then its complex conjugate is also a root
For any two complex numbers, conjugation is distributive over addition, subtraction, multiplication and division

annotations.label: Fixed points of conjugation are reals

anchor.snippet: A complex number is equal to its complex conjugate if its imaginary part is zero
Conjugation does not change the modulus of a complex number

annotations.label: Product with conjugate equals modulus squared

anchor.snippet: The product of a complex number with its conjugate is equal to the square of the number's modulus

annotations.label: Conjugation commutes with exp, log, integer powers

anchor.snippet: Conjugation is commutative under composition with exponentiation to integer powers, with the exponential function, and with the natural logarithm for nonzero arguments

annotations.label: Real polynomial roots in conjugate pairs

anchor.snippet: non-real roots of real polynomials occur in complex conjugate pairs

annotations.label: Conjugation commutes with real-valued holomorphic functions
Conjugation is a field automorphism fixing R
Recovering real/imaginary parts, modulus, argument from conjugate

anchor.snippet: its conjugate is sufficient to reproduce the parts

annotations.label: Lines in the plane via conjugate

anchor.snippet: can be used to specify lines in the plane
One may also define a conjugation for quaternions and split-quaternions

annotations.label: Generalized conjugation is multiplicative with reversal

anchor.snippet: All these generalizations are multiplicative only if the factors are reversed

annotations.label: Complex conjugation / real structure on a vector space

anchor.snippet: There is also an abstract notion of conjugation for vector spaces
